zh.lifeSummary: Joanna Scadding於1512年在英國薩默塞特奧特福德受洗。她於1536年與Richard Trott在英國薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她埋葬在英國薩默塞特奧特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joanna Scadding于1512年在英国薩默塞特奧特福德受洗。她于1536年与Richard Trott在英国薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她埋葬在英国薩默塞特奧特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Scadding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: unexplained. Possibly linked with SW English dialect words scad meaning ‘salmon fry’ and ‘peat slab’, in either case in an old regional plural form in -en, but no certainty is possible.

variants.name: Scadden
meanings: English (Dorset): unexplained. The name may be linked with the Southwest English dialect word scad meaning ‘salmon fry’ and ‘peat slab’ (in either case in an old regional plural form in -en), but no certainty is possible. Scaddans have also been established in Tipperary since the 12th century.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Joanna Scadding was christened in 1512, in Otterford, Somerset, England. She married Richard Trott in 1536, in Staplegrove, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She was buried in Otterford, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Joanna Scadding a été baptisée en 1512, à Otterford, Somerset, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Trott en 1536, à Staplegrove, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elleenterrée à Otterford, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Joanna Scadding wurde 1512 in Otterford, Somerset, England getauft. Sie hat 1536 in Staplegrove, Somerset, England Richard Trott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie wurde in Otterford, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Joanna Scadding è stato battezzato nel 1512 nel Otterford, Somerset, England. Lei sposato Richard Trott nel 1536, nel Staplegrove, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Fu sepolta a Otterford, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Scaddingは1512年にイギリスソメルセトオッテルフォードで洗礼を受けた。1536年にイギリスソメルセトスタプレグローブでRichard Trottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスソメルセトオッテルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Scadding(은)는 1512년 영국 서머세트 오터퍼드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1536년 영국 서머세트 스타플레그로브에서 Richard Trott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 서머세트 오터퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joanna Scadding foi batizada em 1512, em Otterford, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Trott em 1536, em Staplegrove, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela foi sepultada em Otterford, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Joanna Scadding была крещена в 1512 г. в местности оттирфорд, сомирсет, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Trott в 1536 г. в местности стаплегров, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она была похоронена в местности оттирфорд, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Joanna Scadding se bautizó en 1512, en Otterford, Somerset, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard Trott en 1536, en Staplegrove, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Fue sepultada en Otterford, Somerset, Inglaterra.
